[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000101 2
1 1001101 4
2 1111010 5
3 1101011 5
4 0111000 3
5 0110111 5
6 1110111 6
7 1000111 4

01 10 0001000 1
12 21 0001000 1
23 32 0100000 1
34 43 0100000 1
45 54 0000000 a
56 65 0000100 1
67 76 0011100 3
70 07 1001000 2

13 31 0000000 a
24 42 0110000 2
35 53 0000101 2 match 0
46 64 0010000 1
57 75 0000101 2 match 0
60 06 0001000 1
71 17 0001000 1

14 41 0000000 a
25 52 0000000 a

47 74 0010010 2
50 05 0000000 a
61 16 0001000 1
72 27 0011000 2

15 51 0000000 a
26 62 0011000 2
